continue: Click or press Enter to continue

move.label: Move Preview
move.description: Before moving to a tile via button, checks and displays information if a threat is detected.

focus.label: Auto-Input Focus
focus.description: Immediately focuses the terminal input line after combat or events end.

battle.label: Enable Battle Scene
battle.description: Displays a high-level overview of the battle status at the top of the screen.

audio.label: Master Volume
audio.description: Adjusts the overall volume level for all in-game music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX).

save_and_exit: Unsaved progress will be lost. Return to title?
